text: Being here, I am stirred by a sense of forward motion and creative anticipation. The glass walls and meeting room evoke preparation and potential, as if ideas are about to convene and shape something new. In the exhibit, surrounded by words about invention and images of thoughtful experimentation, I feel the pulse of curiosity and discovery. The environment encourages a contemplative excitement, pushing me to reflect deeply on the possibilities inherent in human ingenuity and collaboration.
